seoTitle: Dunk vs Dunkeld — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dunk and Dunkeld. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dunk and Dunkeld.
heading: Dunk vs Dunkeld — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dunk, Queensland and Dunkeld, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dunk has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Dunkeld (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dunk or Dunkeld safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dunk has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Dunkeld scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dunk scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Dunkeld scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dunk or Dunkeld?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dunk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
